_comment: Paste the mcp block below into your VS Code User settings.json.
_note: Requires VS Code 1.99+ and GitHub Copilot extension (agent mode).
_tabs_note: Details + Manifest tabs appear after the server first connects. Trigger by opening Copilot Chat → Agent mode → use any laravel-herd tool.

_sse_alternative._comment: Use this instead if you want Details + Manifest tabs visible immediately without first use.
_sse_alternative._step1: Start the HTTP server first: npx laravel-herd-mcp --http --port 3333
_sse_alternative._step2: Then use this config in settings.json:
